name: Crawfish Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded cheddar or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the chopped green onions, celery, and garlic until clear.
2. Add the cooked crawfish tails, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Grease a pie plate with butter or cooking spray.
4. Pour the cooked crawfish mixture into the greased pie plate.
5. In a bowl, beat together the eggs and milk for 1 minute.
6. Add the Bisquick to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
7. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar or Swiss cheese evenly over the top of the crawfish.
8. Pour the Bisquick and egg mixture over the crawfish and cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 to 40 minutes, or until set.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving warm.
Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
